# Marriott Bonvoy® HDFC Bank Credit Card
  * Earn up to 4 Free Night Awards
  * Marriott Bonvoy® Silver Elite Status
  * Earn 8 points on every Rs.150 spent at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy


[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=MRTB&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")

### Detailed cashback break-up

[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?icid=website_organic_herobanner_marriottbonvoycreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb "Apply Now")
### More benefits than ever before
Welcome Benefits
  * In a single minimum transaction of Rs. 500 within 90 days of card open date or on card fee levy the customers would receive the following benefits*:  
- 1 Free Night Award (valued at 15,000 Marriott Bonvoy Points)  
- 10 Elite Night Credits*  
- Silver Elite Status


Marriott Bonvoy Reward Points Benefit / Reward Benefits
  * Earn 8 Marriott Bonvoy Points per Rs. 150 spent at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy*
  * - Earn 4 Marriott Bonvoy Points per Rs. 150 spent on Travel, Dining & Entertainment*
  * - Earn 2 Marriott Bonvoy® Points per Rs. 150 spent on all other applicable purchases*


Credit Benefits
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*
  * Complimentary access outside India every year. To view list of International Lounges, visit [DCI travel tool app(opens in a new tab)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dci.WebAppTest&pcampaignid=web_share).
  * *Terms & Conditions Apply - [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/terms-and-condition.pdf)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card#offers "View More")
![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
![ads-block-img](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Additional Benefits
### Milestone Benefits
  * 1 Free Night Award on Eligible Spend of INR 6 lakhs in an Anniversary Year*
  * 1 Free Night Award on Eligible Spend of INR 9 lakhs in an Anniversary Year*
  * 1 Free Night Award on Eligible Spend of INR 15 lakhs in an Anniversary Year*
  * 1 Free Night Award and 10 Elite Night Credits on eligible spend transaction of Rs.500 or fee levy on the card
  * Note:  
Each Free Night Award (valid for 12months) can be redeemed for a one-night stay, inclusive of room rate and applicable taxes, at hotels participating in Marriott Bonvoy® with a redemption level up to 15,000 Marriott Bonvoy® Points.  
To know more about Milestone Benefit [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/terms-and-condition.pdf)


[View More (opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card "View More")
![Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Insurance Benefits
  * Delay or loss of checked-in baggage cover of up to $250
  * Loss of travel documents cover of up to $250
  * Flight delay cover of up to $250
  * Air accidental cover of up to $12,500
  * Emergency medical expenses up to $18,750
  * Credit shield of up to INR100,000
  * Loss liability cover of up to INR 900,000
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://connect.hdfc.bank.in/applications/webforms/apply/HDFC_NomineeDetails/Nominee.aspx) to update your nominee details
[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/pdfs/Marriott-Bonvoy-HDFC-Bank-Final.pdf) to know more about insurance details


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card "View More")
![Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Banking Benefits
  * Up to 50 days of interest-free Credit from the date of purchase*
  * Ability to convert large transactions to a SmartEMI after purchase
  * Contactless payments* to improve your purchase experience
  * Protection against fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card*
  * Simple card management via HDFC Bank MyCards


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card "View More")
![Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Lounge Benefits
  * 12 Complimentary access within India (both at domestic and international terminals) using the Marriott Bonvoy® HDFC Bank Credit Card each year
  * Complimentary access within India (both at domestic and international terminals) every year. To view list of Domestic lounges, [Click Here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/lounge-terms-and-condition.pdf)
  * Complimentary access outside India every year. To view list of International Lounges, visit [DCI travel tool app(opens in a new tab)](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.dci.WebAppTest&pcampaignid=web_share)


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card "View More")
![Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
### Golf Benefits
  * Get access to 2 Complimentary golf lessons per quarter at select Driving ranges in India. Each Golf lesson will span a minimum of 30 minutes and will be inclusive of:
  * - Green Fees to access the golf course or driving range, for the lesson
  * - Cost of instructor's fees
  * - Range golf balls at 50 golf balls per lesson
  * Get 2 Complimentary Golf course access per quarter at select premium golf courses in India and golf courses internationally.
  * Get access to Golf Concierge Assistance services, available 9a.m to 9p.m every day call 18003093100
  * Terms and Conditions apply: Please read the detailed T&C and enjoy complimentary golf across the world.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/golf-access-terms-and-conditions.pdf) to see the list of domestic and international golf courses.


[View More ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card "View More")
![Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Wondering if you are eligible?
Salaried
  * **Nationality** : Indian
  * **Age****:** 21 – 60 years
  * **Net Monthly Income** > Rs 1,00,000


Self Employed
  * **Nationality** :Indian
  * **Age** : 21 – 65 years
  * ****Annual**** **ITR** > ₹15 lakh per annum 


![Print](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
[ Know More  ](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card/eligibility "Know More")
#  Save up to 13.62% annually with 1 Lakh monthly spends just like 12 lakh+ HDFC Bank Card Holders 
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=MRTB&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![Dinners club black credit card](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Documents required to get you started
Identity Proof 
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar Card
  * Voter ID
  * Driving Licence
  * PAN Card
  * Passport size photographs


Address Proof
  * Latest Utility bills (electricity, water, gas or telephone)
  * Rental Agreement
  * Passport
  * Aadhaar Card
  * Voter ID


Income Proof
  * Latest Salary slips (for salaried individuals),
  * Income Tax Returns (self-employed ITR)
  * Form 16
  * Bank Statements


## Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:
The Steps are:
  * Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  * Step 2- Confirm your details
  * Step 3- Select your Card
  * Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*


*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.
[Apply Now (opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=MRTB&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG "Apply Now")
![no data](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
## Know more about the card
  1. ### Fees and Charges
  2. ### Reward Points Redemption
  3. ### Additional Features
  4. ### Contactless Payment 
  5. ### Important Links 
  6. ### Card Activation
  7. ### Card Control via MyCards
  8. ### Most Important Terms and Conditions
  9. ### Application Channels


#  Fees and Charges 
  * Joining/ Renewal Membership Fee of ₹3,000 + Applicable Taxes


[Click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit-card/fees-and-charges) to view details of Fees and Charges on Marriott Bonvoy HDFC Bank Credit Card
![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Reward Points Redemption 
  * Redeem Marriott Bonvoy points to book a stay at properties participating in Marriott Bonvoy, Marriott Bonvoy Moments™ experiences, travel, and more.  



**Note:**
*[Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/terms-and-condition.pdf) for terms and conditions.
  * Marriott Bonvoy Points and Award Redemptions may not be exchanged or redeemed by a member for cash, prizes, or credit.


  * Points posted from a transfer or earned from Credit Cards may not be redeemable for certain Award Redemptions.


  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.marriott.com/loyalty/terms/default.mi#redeem) to know more.   



![Card Management & Control](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Additional Features 
  * Concierge Service  
Avail of Concierge Services from 9: 00 AM to 9:00 PM by calling toll free: 18003093100 or email: support@marriotthdfcbank.com. 
  * HDFC Bank Customer Service  
24*7 Helpline-  
Toll-Free: 1800 266 3310  
Landline: 022-6171 7606 (For customers travelling overseas)
  * Smart EMI   
Convert your big spends into EMI after purchase, [click here](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/smartemi).


![Smart EMI](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Contactless Payment 
  * The HDFC Bank Marriott Bonvoy Credit Card is enabled for contactless payments for fast and secure payments. 
  * Contactless payments for Diners cards will be accepted only in HDFC Bank Point of Sale (POS) machines. For all the other machines, Pin will need to be inputted


(Please note that in India, payment through contactless mode is allowed for a maximum of ₹5,000 for a single transaction without entering your Credit Card PIN. However, if the amount is higher than or equal to ₹5,000, the Card holder must enter the Credit Card PIN for security reasons. You may check for the Contactless Network Symbol on your card.) 
![Zero Lost Card Liability](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Important Links 
  * To know about the membership number associated with your Email ID, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.marriott.com/lookUpMemberNumber.mi).
  * If you have two Marriott Bonvoy Membership Numbers, please [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://help.marriott.com/s/article/Article-22511) to merge both of your Marriott Bonvoy Accounts.   

  * Customers can merge two membership IDs post 30 days. After merging of accounts, all points/qualifying night credits and other benefits will be transferred to the membership ID which customer decides to retain. 
  * To view complete details for redemption of Free Night Award, kindly [click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.marriott.com/loyalty/redeem/free-night-award-redemption.mi).


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
###  Card Activation 
  * HDFC Bank Credit Card holders must activate their Credit Cards within 30 days from the Card Open Date, as per ‘Master Direction – Credit and Debit Card – Issuance and Conduct Directions, 2022’ dated April 21, 2022, realised by Reserve Bank of India (RBI). In case the Credit Card is not activated within 30 days of the card opening date, a grace period of 7 days will be given to activate the card with the below-mentioned modes. At the end of the 37th day, the card will be closed.


Kindly refer to the [FAQ(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/product-feature-related-queries.pdf) to know the process of activating the card.
![Card Activation](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Card Control via MyCards 
[MyCards(opens in a new tab)](https://mycards.hdfcbank.com/), a mobile-based service platform for all Credit Card needs, facilitates convenient activation and management of IndianOil HDFC Bank Credit Card on the go. It ensures a seamless experience without the need for passwords or downloads.
  * Credit Card Registration and Activation
  * Set up Card PIN 
  * Manage card controls like online spends, contactless transactions
  * View Transactions/Download e-statements
  * Block/Re-issue card
  * Apply for an Add-on Card, manage, set PIN and card controls for Add-on card


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Most Important Terms and Conditions 
  * *The [Most Important Terms and Conditions(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/personal-mitc/mitc-in-english.pdf) for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/cards/services) to access all important links related to your Credit Card.
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy/pdfs/card-member-agreement-marriott.pdf) for the card member agreement
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/terms-and-condition.pdf) for product specific T&C
  * [Click here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/personal-banking/discover-products/cards/credit-cards/marriott-bonvoy-credit/product-feature-related-queries.pdf) for product specific FAQ


![Revolving Credit](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)
#  Application Channels 
You can choose any of the following easy options to apply for your HDFC Bank Credit Card:
  * **1. Website  
**You can quickly apply online by clicking [here(opens in a new tab)](https://applyonline.hdfc.bank.in/cards/credit-cards.html?CHANNELSOURCE=MRTB&DEDUPE=N&LGcode=MKTG&icid=website_organic_herobanner_marriottbonvoy%C2%AEhdfcbankcreditcard:banner:applynow#nbb).
  * **2. NetBanking  
**If you're an existing HDFC Bank customer, simply[ log in(opens in a new tab)](https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/ "https://netbanking.hdfcbank.com/netbanking/") to NetBanking and apply from the ‘Cards’ section.
  * **3. HDFC Bank Branch  
**Prefer a face-to-face interaction? Just visit your nearest [branch(opens in a new tab)](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/branch-locator "https://www.hdfc.bank.in/branch-locator") and our staff will help you with the application.
  * **4. Marriott Bonvoy Website  
**You can apply online through Marriott Bonvoy Website by [clicking here(opens in a new tab)](https://www.marriott.com/credit-cards/india-credit-cards.mi)


![Application Process](https://www.hdfc.bank.in/content/dam/hdfcbankpws/in/en/preview-img.png)

##  Frequently Asked Questions
